_comment: Persona voice key -> Piper UA speaker mapping for tts-server-uk.py. The 'speaker' field must be one of the names from the Piper model's speaker_id_map (uk_UA-ukrainian_tts-medium ships with three speakers: lada, mykyta, tetiana). length_scale > 1.0 slows speech down; < 1.0 speeds it up. The persona's tts_voice in config/personas/*.json picks one of these keys.

solomiya.speaker: lada
solomiya._comment: Warm female timbre, slightly slowed for clarity.

onyx.speaker: mykyta
onyx._comment: Piper UA medium has no second male speaker; both onyx and echo map to mykyta.
